title: CI: Parallelize and speed up plugins-test
author: skoeva

findings.description: Commit subject 'CI: Parallelize and speed up plugins-test' uses uppercase area prefix and missing SubArea. Convention is 'ci: plugins-test: Parallelize and speed up'. Unaddressed from previous review.
plugins-test target omits npm ci for headlamp-plugin before ./test-headlamp-plugin.js; fresh-checkout make plugins-test will fail. Unaddressed from previous review.
xargs -P parallel workers do not emit the failing directory name prominently; consider capturing per-worker logs to aid debugging.
